title: Measurements and optical-model analyses of the elastic scattering of protons from Pd, Cd, and Sn isotopes in the nonresonance energy region

scattering of protons from Pd, Cd, and Sn isotopes in

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Izv. Rossiiskoi Akademii Nauk, Ser.Fiz., Vol.37, p.1880 (1973)

x4freetext: Eight detectors of DDS-8/2A type placed
around the target within the range of 30-165 degr. on
a rotational copper disk cooled up to the low
Scintillation counter placed at the fixed
angle was used as a Coulomb monitor.
Targets of Pd,Cd, and Sn isotopes (average thickness of
0.25 mg/cm2 and 2 cm diameter foil) were used.
SD: small correction in ref. (issue added).
